subtitle: A 6-week practical program to help students understand, use, evaluate, and build with AI.

weeks.title: AI Foundations and AI Literacy
weeks.focus: Understand what AI is, where it is used, what it can and cannot do, and how to think critically about AI output.

weeks.title: Prompt Engineering and AI for Learning
weeks.focus: Use better prompts, structure, constraints, iteration, and verification to turn AI into a stronger study partner.
weeks.signature_activity: Bad prompt vs good prompt challenge

weeks.title: Data Thinking and Machine Learning Basics
weeks.focus: Understand datasets, features, labels, prediction, recommendation, and why biased data creates weak AI systems.

weeks.title: Python, Automation, and Computational Thinking
weeks.focus: Learn Python basics, logic, and simple automation patterns to understand how AI apps and workflows are built.

weeks.title: RAG, MCP, and AI-Powered Systems
weeks.focus: Understand retrieval, semantic search, knowledge grounding, MCP, tools, resources, prompts, and agent-style systems.

weeks.title: Capstone Development and AI Showcase
weeks.focus: Apply AI concepts, prompting, data thinking, RAG, MCP, workflows, and ethics in a final AI-enabled project.
